# Story 2.2: POS Product Grid + Category Navigation + Search

Status: done

<!-- Generated by bmad-create-story workflow on 2026-05-11. -->

## Story

As a cashier,
I want xem lưới sản phẩm theo danh mục với khả năng tìm kiếm theo tên,
so that tôi có thể tìm món khách order nhanh chóng trong giờ cao điểm.

## Acceptance Criteria

1. **POS layout thay placeholder bằng product area thật:** Given menu cache đã có dữ liệu từ Story 2.1, when cashier mở `/pos`, then thấy two-column landscape layout: cột trái product area gồm category navigation + search + product grid, cột phải cart panel placeholder cố định bên phải cho Story 2.4; viewport `<768px` vẫn hiển thị message unsupported hiện có.
2. **Category navigation:** Given categories từ `useCategories()`, when `/pos` render, then category navigation hiển thị tất cả categories active, sorted theo `sortOrder` rồi `name`, category đầu tiên active mặc định sau khi data load, và active state rõ bằng text + visual indicator không chỉ màu.
3. **Product filtering theo category:** Given category đang chọn, when product grid render, then chỉ hiển thị products có `categoryId` matching và `isActive=true`, sorted theo `sortOrder` rồi `name`, dùng data từ Dexie/cache qua hooks Story 2.1.
4. **ProductTile component:** Given product grid có products, when render từng item, then mỗi product render qua `<ProductTile />` touch target ≥48px, hiển thị `name`, `priceVnd` qua `formatVnd()` (`35000` → `35.000 ₫`), và indicator nhỏ `Có tùy chọn` nếu `optionGroupIds.length > 0`.
5. **ProductTile accessibility + keyboard:** Given cashier dùng keyboard/screen reader, when focus vào ProductTile, then tile là semantic `button` hoặc element tương đương có role button, `aria-label` gồm tên + giá + trạng thái có tùy chọn nếu có, Enter/Space activate, focus indicator rõ theo UX-DR34.
6. **Search behavior:** Given search input ở header product area, when cashier gõ `Bạc`, then search debounced 200ms, filter products theo `name` case-insensitive và normalize accents tiếng Việt (`Bạc` match `bac`, `bạc`, `BAC`), category navigation vẫn giữ trạng thái active và cart context không mất.
7. **Empty states:** Given categories/products chưa load, when Dexie query pending, then render local loading skeleton/text nhẹ trong product area, không khóa toàn màn hình. Given search/category không có product match, then render `<EmptyState />` với copy `Không tìm thấy sản phẩm phù hợp.`; nếu menu cache trống, copy hướng dẫn `Chưa có dữ liệu menu. Hãy kết nối mạng để tải menu.` và không hiển thị raw error.
8. **Click/tap product:** Given cashier click/tap ProductTile, when product có option groups, then gọi/open placeholder interaction cho `OptionModal` đủ để Story 2.3 wire chi tiết (ví dụ state `selectedProductForOptions` + non-blocking placeholder/test seam). When product không có option groups, then gọi cart add seam/placeholder cho Story 2.4; story này không cần implement cart store thật.
9. **Focus order:** Given cashier Tab navigation trên `/pos`, when đi qua POS surface, then focus order theo flow visual: search → category nav → product grid → cart placeholder; không nhảy vào element ẩn hoặc mất focus.
10. **Performance:** Given seed demo 20–30 products, when cashier click/touch ProductTile hoặc đổi category/search, then visual response/pressed state xảy ra <100ms và filter UI không bị lag thấy rõ; tests nên verify debounce/search deterministically bằng fake timers.
11. **Regression gates:** Required gates pass and are recorded: `cd pos-web && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test && npm run build`; regression scan vẫn đảm bảo không dùng `localStorage`/`sessionStorage` cho token và không dùng `dangerouslySetInnerHTML`.

## Tasks / Subtasks

- [x] Build POS product UI shell (AC: 1,9)
  - [x] Update `pos-web/src/routes/pos/pos-shell.tsx` to replace placeholder left panel with real product area while preserving two-column layout and cart placeholder.
  - [x] Keep narrow viewport message exact: `POS hoạt động tốt nhất ở màn hình ngang hoặc laptop/tablet`.
  - [x] Ensure routes layer imports `features/menu` and shared UI only; do not move POS business logic into `shared/`.
- [x] Add shared/domain UI utilities (AC: 4,7)
  - [x] Add `pos-web/src/shared/lib/format-vnd.ts` or equivalent `formatVnd(value: number): string` using `Intl.NumberFormat('vi-VN', { style: 'currency', currency: 'VND', maximumFractionDigits: 0 })` or stable equivalent producing `35.000 ₫`.
  - [x] Add reusable `<EmptyState />` under `pos-web/src/shared/components/ui/empty-state.tsx` if not already present; copy-driven, no raw errors.
- [x] Add ProductTile component (AC: 4,5,8,10)
  - [x] Create `pos-web/src/features/menu/components/product-tile.tsx` with props for product, `onSelect`, optional `variant`.
  - [x] Use semantic button, min height/touch target ≥48px, visible hover/focus/pressed states using existing café tokens.
  - [x] Display option indicator `Có tùy chọn` only when `optionGroupIds.length > 0`.
  - [x] Keep component pure; no direct Dexie/cart imports.
- [x] Add category navigation + search state (AC: 2,3,6,9)
  - [x] Create or inline `CategoryNav` in `features/menu/components/category-nav.tsx` or `pos-shell.tsx` if small; category buttons must be keyboard accessible.
  - [x] On categories load, select first active/sorted category once; preserve selected category when search changes.
  - [x] Add search input with label, 200ms debounce helper/hook, Vietnamese accent normalization behavior aligned with existing `useProducts`.
  - [x] If existing `useProducts({ categoryId, search })` already normalizes accents, reuse it; avoid duplicate query logic unless extracting a shared helper.
- [x] Wire product grid behavior (AC: 3,7,8,10)
  - [x] Use `useCategories()` and `useProducts({ categoryId: selectedCategoryId, search: debouncedSearch })` from Story 2.1.
  - [x] Render loading state when hooks return `undefined`.
  - [x] Render EmptyState for no products/search and menu-empty states.
  - [x] For product with option groups, set `selectedProductForOptions` and render a temporary accessible placeholder (`OptionModal` detailed implementation deferred to Story 2.3) or expose callback seam with test coverage.
  - [x] For product without option groups, call an `onQuickAdd` seam that is currently no-op/placeholder with TODO for Story 2.4; do not invent cart store in this story.
- [x] Tests (AC: 1–11)
  - [x] Add/extend `pos-web/src/routes/pos/pos-shell.test.tsx` or feature tests with fake IndexedDB seeded categories/products.
  - [x] Test default first category active, category click filters products, inactive products hidden, sort order, price format, option indicator.
  - [x] Test search debounce 200ms and Vietnamese accent normalization.
  - [x] Test EmptyState copy for no search results and menu-empty state.
  - [x] Test keyboard activation/focus basics for ProductTile (Enter/Space calls handler; aria-label includes name + formatted price).
  - [x] Run and record full frontend gates.


### Review Findings

- [x] [Review][Patch] Search debounce is not deterministic and can apply earlier than 200ms because the effect reschedules on every debounced value change [pos-web/src/routes/pos/pos-shell.tsx:15]
- [x] [Review][Patch] Empty menu state is masked by the loading branch when both categories/products are empty arrays [pos-web/src/routes/pos/pos-shell.tsx:51]

## Dev Notes

### Scope boundaries

- This story owns the visible POS product browsing surface: category navigation, search input, product grid, ProductTile, product empty/loading states, and minimal seams for next stories.
- This story does **not** own full OptionModal implementation (Story 2.3), cart store/CartPanel line items (Story 2.4), checkout/order build/sync, backend changes, menu sync algorithm changes, or Admin CRUD.
- Do not create backend endpoints. All product/category data must come from Story 2.1 Dexie cache + hooks.

### Current implementation state to preserve/read before coding

- `pos-web/src/routes/pos/pos-shell.tsx` currently contains POS placeholder two-column layout and cart placeholder. Replace only the product placeholder; preserve route alert rendering from RoleGate and the right cart placeholder until Story 2.4.
- `pos-web/src/features/menu/hooks.ts` already provides `useCategories()` and `useProducts({ categoryId?, search? })` using Dexie `useLiveQuery`, filters `isActive`, sorts by `sortOrder` then Vietnamese name compare, and normalizes Vietnamese accents for search. Reuse this rather than querying Dexie directly in components.
- `pos-web/src/db/schemas/menu.ts` defines `MenuCategoryRecord` and `MenuProductRecord` with `optionGroupIds: string[]`; ProductTile should accept this product shape or a narrow Pick.
- `pos-web/src/features/menu/sync.ts` writes full snapshots atomically. Do not change it for this story except if tests need a small exported helper; avoid regressing online recovery behavior fixed in Story 2.1.
- `pos-web/src/shared/components/ui/button.tsx` and `input.tsx` exist. Prefer existing primitives/classes when useful, but `ProductTile` should be domain-specific under `features/menu/components/`.
- `pos-web/src/routes/_layout.tsx` contains header with `ConnectivityIndicator`, `PendingCounter`, and PWA prompt. Do not remove header status components.

### Architecture and guardrails

- Source of truth on conflict: `_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/architecture.md`.
- FE layering: `routes/` may import `features/` and `shared/`; `features/menu` may import `shared/` and `db`; `shared/` must not import `features/`, `routes/`, or `db`. Do not put ProductTile in `shared` if it depends on menu/product semantics.
- TypeScript strict; component file names kebab-case; component names PascalCase; hooks camelCase with `use` prefix.
- Token/security rules still apply in UI code: no `localStorage`/`sessionStorage` token usage, no `dangerouslySetInnerHTML`.
- Money display: VND integer only, formatted via `formatVnd()`; no decimals/floats.
- POS UX no-screen-change: search/category/filter only changes product grid content; cart context/right panel must remain mounted.

### UX/accessibility requirements

- ProductTile minimum touch target ≥48px; use clear pressed/hover/focus states. Selected/active category must not rely on color alone; include border/underline/font weight or `aria-current`/textual semantics.
- ProductTile aria-label should include product name and formatted price, e.g. `Bạc Xỉu, 35.000 ₫, có tùy chọn`.
- Search input needs visible label or `aria-label` in Vietnamese. Debounce is 200ms; raw input should update immediately, filtered query after debounce.
- EmptyState copy for product search must be exactly `Không tìm thấy sản phẩm phù hợp.`.
- Loading should be local to product area, not a blocking full-screen overlay.
- Maintain keyboard focus order: search → category nav → product grid → cart placeholder.

### Previous story intelligence

- Story 2.1 completed menu cache and hooks; gates passed. Critical learnings: use existing `apiClient`/auth only for sync, Dexie menu cache must support offline reload, `useProducts()` active-only filtering and Vietnamese normalization already exist.
- Story 1.9 added `PosShell` alert rendering for admin RoleGate denial. Preserve the `routeMessage` alert at top of POS shell.
- Story 1.7/1.9 established warm café tokens and responsive POS shell. Do not regress narrow fallback or header status.
- Prior review fixed shared → features layering violations; keep shared utilities generic only.

### File structure guidance

Expected files to add/update:

```text
pos-web/src/
├── routes/pos/
│   ├── pos-shell.tsx                 # UPDATE real product area
│   └── pos-shell.test.tsx            # NEW/UPDATE tests
├── features/menu/components/
│   ├── product-tile.tsx              # NEW
│   └── category-nav.tsx              # NEW if not inline
├── shared/components/ui/
│   └── empty-state.tsx               # NEW generic copy-driven state
└── shared/lib/
    └── format-vnd.ts                 # NEW generic VND formatter
```

### Testing Standards

- Use Vitest + React Testing Library for component behavior.
- Use fake timers for 200ms debounce; do not make tests sleep real time.
- Seed fake IndexedDB or mock `features/menu/hooks` deterministically. Prefer fake IndexedDB if practical to verify Story 2.1 integration.
- Required command set:

```bash
cd pos-web && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test && npm run build
```

### Debug Log References

- 2026-05-11 20:31 +07: Started dev-story workflow, loaded project context and Story 2.2.
- 2026-05-11 20:33 +07: Added POS product browsing components and initial route wiring.
- 2026-05-11 20:36 +07: Ran required frontend gates successfully; noted existing React act warnings in POS tests and existing HydrateFallback warning in App test output, both non-failing.
- 2026-05-11 20:55 +07: Re-ran `npm run typecheck`, `npm run lint`, `npm test`, `npm run build`, plus security grep after a small debounce guard; all gates passed. Vitest still reports non-failing React act warnings in POS tests and existing HydrateFallback warning in App test output.
- 2026-05-11 21:31 +07: Fixed review findings: moved debounce hook to `features/menu/hooks.ts`, made effect depend only on `value`/`delayMs`, added fake-timer deterministic test, and split `hasLoadedCategories`/`isMenuEmpty` so an empty category cache renders the menu-empty EmptyState immediately.
- 2026-05-11 21:31 +07: Required gates passed: `npm run typecheck`, `npm run lint`, `npm test` (33 tests), `npm run build`; regression grep excluding test files found no `localStorage`/`sessionStorage` token usage and no `dangerouslySetInnerHTML`.
- 2026-05-11 21:37 +07: Investigated backend NestJS DI failure: `MenuSyncController` uses `JwtAuthGuard`, but `MenuModule` did not import a module exporting the guard/JwtService provider context.
- 2026-05-11 21:40 +07: Fixed DI wiring by exporting `JwtModule`, `JwtAuthGuard`, and `RolesGuard` from `AuthModule`, importing `AuthModule` into `MenuModule`, and adding `menu.module.spec.ts` compilation regression coverage.
- 2026-05-11 21:41 +07: Backend gates passed in `pos-api`: `npm run typecheck`, `npm run lint`, `npm test -- --runInBand` (31 tests), `npm run build`.

### Completion Notes List

- Replaced left POS placeholder with product area: visible search, active category navigation, debounced product grid, local loading/empty states, and preserved right cart placeholder plus mobile unsupported copy.
- Added reusable VND formatter and copy-driven EmptyState.
- Added pure ProductTile and CategoryNav components with semantic buttons, touch target classes, focus states, `aria-label`, `aria-current`, and non-color-only active indicator.
- Reused Story 2.1 `useCategories()` / `useProducts()` hooks for active filtering, sort order, and Vietnamese accent-normalized search.
- Added option modal seam placeholder via `selectedProductForOptions`; quick-add remains a no-op TODO seam for Story 2.4.
- Added fake IndexedDB integration tests covering category default/selection, product filtering/sorting, inactive hiding, VND display, option indicator, debounce/search normalization, empty states, and keyboard activation.
- Re-ran gates after follow-up fix: `npm run typecheck`, `npm run lint`, `npm test`, `npm run build`, and token/XSS regression grep all passed; build reports only the existing >500 kB chunk warning.
- Addressed review finding: debounce now schedules/clears timeout from latest `value` and `delayMs` only; deterministic fake-timer coverage verifies no update at 199ms and latest value at 200ms after reschedule.
- Addressed review finding: empty-menu state now depends on loaded categories and active category count, avoiding product-loading masking when category cache is empty.
- Final verification: `npm run typecheck`, `npm run lint`, `npm test`, `npm run build`, and regression grep all passed after the follow-up cleanup.
- Fixed backend menu/auth integration root cause: MenuModule now imports AuthModule, while AuthModule exports the JWT guard/provider context (`JwtModule`, `JwtAuthGuard`, `RolesGuard`) required by `@UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard, RolesGuard)` on `MenuSyncController`.
- Added a Nest TestingModule regression spec proving `MenuModule` compiles with route guards and their dependencies available.
- Verified backend gates: `npm run typecheck`, `npm run lint`, `npm test -- --runInBand`, and `npm run build` all passed in `pos-api`.
